Notes

  • All tests: paired t-test (Human avg vs AI avg), N = 50 LLM agents (49 for names), BH-FDR corrected across 21 metrics per turn.
  • For 4-condition versions (names, balanced_names, balanced_gpt), "Human avg" and "AI avg" are the mean of the two human-labeled and two AI-labeled partner conditions.
  • For 2-condition versions (labels, nonsense_codeword, nonsense_ignore), the test is a direct paired comparison.
  • Quality and Connectedness are excluded (available only at conversation level, not per-turn).
  • Turn 1 = first exchange, Turn 5 = last exchange in the 5-turn conversation.
  • * p_adj < .05, ** p_adj < .01, *** p_adj < .001
